name: testWaitForAllParallel
title: testWaitForAllParallel
description: Waits until execution of all parallel threads finished. In case all threads already finished execution, the function returns instantly.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum time to wait [ms]. Specify 0 to wait without timeout.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
